semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: The vulnerability arises from allowing the addition of sub-columns to parent columns that have an OBJECT(IGNORED) column policy, which can lead to inconsistent or unsupported table schema states.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: The patch introduces a check during the addColumn operation to detect if any new column being added is a sub-column of a parent column with an OBJECT(IGNORED) policy. If such a case is detected, it sets a subject flag to prevent or specially handle this scenario, thereby guarding against invalid schema modifications.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: Prevent adding sub-columns to parent columns with OBJECT(IGNORED) policy to maintain schema integrity during ALTER TABLE operations.

hunk_chain.summary: Add import for Reference and ColumnPolicy classes needed for the new column policy check.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: Prepares next hunk in same file with related context.

hunk_chain.summary: Add logic in addColumn method to detect if any new column is a sub-column of an OBJECT(IGNORED) parent column and set a subject flag accordingly.
